description: 3D 기반의 온라인 멀티서버 확장성을 지닌 .io 스타일 웹 슈팅 게임
rules_and_constraints: Language: HTML, CSS, Vanilla JavaScript only

Scale Constraint: 3D map bounds are massive (-6000 to +6000). Visual objects like items should have large physical scales (e.g. radius 200) to be visible over the high player speed (multiplier 50) and far camera offset (z-distance 200).

features.name: Core Flight Engine
features.details: High-fidelity 3D flight model with pitch/yaw/roll physics. Upgraded engine effects to a dynamic particle system (Sphere-based, color-shifting).

current_activity.details: Replaced legacy cylinder trails with a high-performance particle system from the '1234' reference folder. Features: Sphere-based particles, multi-stage color transition (Skyblue->Orange->Red), and dynamic expansion.
